title: Rottlera tokbrai
taxonomy: Rottlera tokbrai belongs to the family Celastraceae, which is a group of flowering plants commonly known as the staff vine family. This family includes around 70 genera and approximately 1,000 species. The genus Rottlera itself is native to tropical regions of Asia and consists of about 10 species of trees and shrubs.
